statusLoadingDesc: Loading y version lesh screeuyn clashtynagh
statusUsingNoDesc: Cleaysh y version gyn screeuyn clashtynagh
statusLoadingNoDesc: Loading y version gyn screeuyn clashtyn
alertDescribedVersion: Cleayney yn version clashtynagh jeh'n video
alertNonDescribedVersion: Cleaysh y version gyn screeuyn clashtynagh jeh'n video
fallbackError1: Cha nel dty bhraar er ny choyrt stiagh
fallbackError2: Ta ny browseryn shoh co-chrauee rish y chleayst shoh
prefIntroCaptions: Ta ny roshtyn shoh ry-reill myr t'ad cur fo-tiitaghyn.
prefIntroDescription1: Ta'n player shoh cur tastey da'n tushtal clashtynagh ayns daa aght:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Ta'n video ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi.
prefIntroDescription3: Cleays y fo-fockle shoh dy rheynn ny s'cosoylagh rish y skeeal clashtynagh ayns text.
prefIntroDescription4: As t'ou er n'yannoo scansh da'n aght, t'ou uss geddyn stiagh ny s'cosoylagh rish y 'audio description'.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Ta'n player er y duillag shoh ry-obbraghey veih dagh ard lesh ymmyd jeh sniaghtey keyboard (fakin y list ry-hoi).
prefIntroKeyboard3: NOTE: Faagym dy vel cuid jeh'n cho-chosney key ry-chlashtyn rish ny ta'n browser as/ny applicationyn elley ry-chlashtyn. Feaysaghey co-chosney as keydyn modifier diuree derrey t'ou uss geddyn ny cooishyn cooie dhyt.
prefIntroTranscript: Ta ny roshtyn shoh goaill toshiaght er y transcription eddyr-obbragh.
prefCookieWarning: Son ymmyd y yannoo jeh cookies, t'eh ry-hoi ymmyd jeh cookies.
escapeKeyFunction: Dloie yn dialog ny y popup t'ayn nish
prefDescFormatHelp: Mannagh vel ny daa form ry-gheddyn, cha bee agh un form jeu ry-chlashtyn.
prefDescFormatOption1: Video elley lesh screeuyn clashtyn stiagh (recordit ro-laue).
prefDescPause: Cur stayd da'n video dy h-automagh tra ta'n tushtal toshiaght
prefDescVisible: Show yn tushtal ayns text my t'eh er ny choyrt
sampleDescriptionText: Reih dty rheynnyn dy chlashtyn y text sampleyr shoh.
prefHighlight: Cur soilshey er y transcript myr ta'n obbyr goll er
prefSuccess: Ta ny h-ashoonyn er nyn goyrt.
prefNoChange: Cha nel caghlaa erbee er ny yannoo.
windowMoveLeft: Ta'n uinnag er ny ghleashaghey er y laue yesh
windowMoveRight: Ghuinnit yn uinniag gys y laue yesh
windowMoveDown: Ta'n uinnag er ny ghleashaghey sheese
windowMoveStopped: Ta gluaise y veeal er staydys
windowMoveAlert: Drag ny uss ny laghyn-saighdeyr dy ghleashaghey y vee; Bring Enter dy stay.
windowSendBackAlert: Cha nel y fenee shoh er y çheu jeh red erbee.
windowBringTopAlert: Ta'n fuinneig shoh er-y-fa shen roish y chooid elley jeh'n obbyr er y duillag.
resultsSummary4: Cliaght y traa ta co-cheangailt rish red erbee dy chlashtyn y video veih'n point shen.
noResultsFound: Cha nel toshiaght erbee er ny gheddyn.
webEditionDescription: Edition customized as leah y chleasagh media ry-gheddyn Able Player. Ta ath-chroo as obbraghyn ymmydoil er nyn skeaylley liorish TOTHOMweb nyn software ymmydoil.
wpEditionDescription: Plugin WordPress ta cur widget rish Elementor, ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi ry-hoi. Ta ath-chroo as obbraghyn ymmydoil er nyn skeaylley liorish TOTHOMweb nyn software ymmydoil.
thirdPartyDescription: Ta'n produit shoh goaill stiagh y software open source shoh:
